terms.context_quote: Particles in an entangled state share a correlated wave {entangled state}
terms.usefulness: Emphasizes the shared, interconnected nature of entangled particles through a relatable metaphor
terms.risk: Could imply a physical wave rather than a mathematical wavefunction

terms.context_quote: Entangled states are a type of superposition {quantum superposition} involving multiple particles
terms.usefulness: Simplifies the concept while retaining the core idea of combined states
terms.risk: May conflate with classical superposition concepts (e.g., waves overlapping)
